news.headline: UK authorizes charges against NCA officer for alleged $75,000 Bitcoin theft, due to face 15 related offenses in court. Bull run increased value to $4.2M. Changes in law allow seizure of crypto without arrest. NCA seized $26M in cash and crypto to combat money laundering in global campaign. Regulatory framework for digital assets expected in the UK following election victory.
news.summary: A National Crime Agency officer in England and Wales is facing charges for allegedly stealing 50 Bitcoin worth about $75,000 in 2017. The officer, Paul Chowles, is charged with 15 offenses including theft, concealing criminal property, and using criminal property. The Bitcoin is now valued at over $4.2 million at a price of $84,541 per BTC. Chowles is set to appear in court on April 25. Recent amendments allow UK authorities to seize crypto from suspected criminals without arrest. In December 2024, the NCA seized $26 million in cash and crypto during a global anti-money laundering operation. The UK government is expected to establish a regulatory framework for digital assets in 2025, making it a significant market for cryptocurrencies.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.5%. This significant drop in unemployment is attributed to the addition of 250,000 new jobs in the past month alone. Furthermore, the report highlighted a steady growth in wages, with an average increase of 3.2% over the last year. The strong job market has also led to an increase in consumer spending, which has had a positive impact on the overall economy. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the upcoming months, indicating a stable and prosperous economic outlook for the country.

news.headline: Blackstone Mortgage Trust (NYSE: BXMT) declares $0.47 per share dividend for Q1 2025, payable on April 15 to stockholders of record by March 31.
news.summary: In New York, Blackstone Mortgage Trust, Inc. (NYSE: BXMT) has announced a dividend of $0.47 per share for class A common stock for the first quarter of 2025. Shareholders of record by March 31, 2025, will receive the dividend on April 15, 2025. Blackstone Mortgage Trust, a real estate finance company (NYSE: BXMT), focuses on originating senior loans backed by commercial real estate in North America and Europe.

news.headline: Kinetik's subsidiary prices $250M private placement of 6.625% sustainability-linked senior notes due 2028 at 101.25% of par.
news.summary: Kinetik Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KNTK) from Houston and Midland, Texas, shared that its subsidiary, Kinetik Holdings LP, has priced the offering of $250 million 6.625% sustainability-linked senior notes due 2028 at 101.25% of par, along with accrued and unpaid interest from December 15, 2024. These New Notes mature on December 15, 2028, with an annual interest rate of 6.625% and payment scheduled on June 15.

news.headline: World Kinect Corp declares $0.17 quarterly cash dividend per share, payable on April 16, 2025 to shareholders of record on March 31, 2025 (NYSE: WKC).
news.summary: In Miami, World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.17 per share. This dividend will be disbursed on April 16, 2025, to shareholders on record as of March 31, 2025. World Kinect Corporation, based in Miami, Florida, is a worldwide energy management provider catering to over 150,000 clients in the aviation, marine, and land-based sectors.

news.headline: indie Semiconductor grants equity awards to new employees under 2023 Inducement Incentive Plan approved by Board. Website has details.
news.summary: Aliso Viejo, California-based indie Semiconductor (Nasdaq: INDI), a key player in automotive solutions, disclosed the issuance of equity awards known as the “Inducement Grants” from its 2023 Inducement Incentive Plan to fresh hires. The allotment, sanctioned by indie Semiconductor's Board of Directors’ Compensation Committee, is now accessible on the firm's investor relations webpage: https://investors.ind.

news.headline: Champion Homes releases EcoWise™ homes in Troy, MI, aiming to offset annual energy use with renewable energy systems.
news.summary: Champion Homes, Inc. introduces EcoWise™, a new initiative focused on sustainability at their Troy location. The program involves incorporating high-performance enhancements into manufactured homes to enhance energy efficiency. These upgrades are so effective that a renewable energy system could potentially offset the entire annual energy consumption of the home. Notably, the EcoWise™ initiative showcases Champion Homes's most energy-efficient designs yet. These homes not only comply with but also surpass the federal government's stringent standards for high-performance residences. This commitment to sustainability highlights Champion Homes's dedication to reducing energy consumption.

news.headline: M/I Homes announces retirement of Friedrich K.M. Böhm, a board member since 1994. Important news for shareholders.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio on March 14, 2025, M/I Homes, Inc. (NYSE:MHO) shared news that Friedrich K.M. Böhm, a longstanding independent member of the Company's Board of Directors since 1994, has chosen to retire from the Board once his term concludes.

news.headline: GBank Financial Holdings Inc. has filed Amendment No. 1 to Form S-1 Registration Statement. (Characters: 87)
news.summary: In Las Vegas on March 14, 2025, GBank Financial Holdings Inc. revealed that it, as the parent company of GBank, submitted Amendment No. 1 to Form S-1 Registration Statement under the Securities Act of 1933. The Company is listed as OTCQX: GBFH. This update signifies a significant move in the financial sector and showcases the company's commitment to transparency and regulatory compliance. The details of this amendment and its implications on the Company's operations and future prospects are of interest to stakeholders and investors, as it could potentially impact the financial market and the bank's performance. Stay tuned for further developments on this front.

news.headline: Globus Maritime files 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F with audited financial statements for year ended Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Glyfada, Greece, on March 14, 2025, Globus Maritime Limited, a dry bulk shipping company listed on NASDAQ under GLBS, disclosed that their annual report (Form 20-F) featuring audited financial statements for the fiscal year closing on December 31, 2024, has been submitted to the Securities and Exchange Commission. The report is now accessible on Globus Maritime Limited's official website at www.globusmaritime.gr within the Investor Relations section.

news.headline: DISA Global Solutions joins Women In Trucking, promoting women in trucking industry. Membership announced on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: DISA Global Solutions has recently joined the Women In Trucking Association (WIT), a nonprofit group that actively supports the advancement of women in the trucking sector. This move by DISA showcases their commitment to promoting gender diversity in the industry. The Women In Trucking Association aims to increase the number of women employed in trucking, highlight their successes, and address challenges they may face in the field. This partnership is part of DISA's efforts to drive positive change and pave the way for more inclusivity in the sector.

news.headline: Inspired Entertainment extends partnership with Welcome Break, UK's top motorway service operator, supplying gaming machines.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Inspired Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: INSE), a prominent B2B gaming content, technology, and services provider, revealed a contract extension with Welcome Break, a major UK motorway service area operator. Welcome Break oversees 60 service areas and 31 hotels in the UK. The extended partnership designates Inspired as the exclusive supplier of gaming machines for Welcome Break.

news.headline: BW Energy has issued 10 million shares to raise funds for their upcoming ventures.

Stocks in correction zone, consumer confidence hit by tariff fears, inflation worries at 32-year highs. S&P 500 down 10% from Feb highs. Inflation rate at 2.8%, below economist forecasts of 2.9%. Wall Street on four-week losing streak not seen since May 2022.
news.summary: For the fourth week in a row, Wall Street experienced losses, marking a streak not seen since May 2022. The S&P 500 index fell 10% from its February highs, officially entering correction territory. Investor anxiety is on the rise, driven by concerns over trade tariffs proposed by President Trump and sudden spending cuts by the office of Elon Musk at DOGE. Inflation data for February brought some positive news, supporting expectations for Federal Reserve rate cuts in the coming months. The Consumer Price Index showed a year-over-year increase of 2.8%, down from January's 3% and below the predicted 2.9%. Wholesale inflation remained stable month-over-month, contrasting sharply with January's 0.6% jump. Despite these lower-than-expected inflation figures, risk appetite on the market did not improve.

news.headline: US bank deposits fell to $17.933 tln from $17.934 tln in the prior week.
Taiwan's gift card market to reach $3.14 billion in 2025 with 8.9% annual growth; $4.25 billion market by 2029 at 7.9% CAGR.
news.summary: A recent report on the Taiwan Gift Card and Incentive Card Market indicates promising growth prospects. The market is projected to expand by 8.9% annually, reaching an estimated value of US$3.14 billion by 2025. Notably, Taiwan's gift card sector demonstrated strong growth between 2020-2024, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.3%. This positive trend is set to persist, with expectations of continued growth at a CAGR of approximately x% moving forward.

Intevac to pay $0.052 special dividend per share on March 28, 2025 to stockholders of record by March 24, in relation to acquisition by Seagate.
news.summary: Intevac, Inc. declared a one-time special cash dividend of $0.052 per share of common stock to be paid on March 28, 2025, to stockholders of record as of March 24, 2025. This announcement came as Intevac is in the process of being acquired by Seagate Technology Holdings plc. The special dividend is a part of the acquisition deal. Intevac, a supplier of thin-film processing systems, is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol IVAC. This move aims to benefit shareholders before the acquisition process is finalized.

news.headline: Primoris Services Corp (NYSE: PRIM) appoints David King as Interim President/CEO replacing Tom McCormick, effective March 20, 2025. Board initiating search for permanent CEO.
news.summary: In Dallas, Primoris Services Corporation (NYSE: PRIM) revealed that David King, the Chairman and former CEO, has been appointed as the Interim President and CEO. This decision comes following the departure of Tom McCormick from the company, effective March 20, 2025. A search for a permanent CEO is in progress, with consideration of both internal and external candidates.

news.headline: Mach Natural Resources LP releases 2024 tax packages for common units. Schedule K-1 now available online for shareholders.
news.summary: Mach Natural Resources LP (NYSE: MNR) based in Oklahoma City has released tax packages for the year ending December 31, 2024, for common unit holders. These packages, featuring the Schedule K-1 (Form 1065), can be accessed at www.taxpackagesupport.com/mnr. The company plans to start sending out the 2024 tax packages around Wednesday, March 19, 2025. For inquiries and more details, stakeholders can reach out for assistance.

news.headline: Pacira receives three director nominations from DOMA Perpetual. No shareholder action needed at this time.
news.summary: PARSIPPANY, N.J., March 14, 2025 - Pacira BioSciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: PCRX) announced that DOMA Perpetual Capital Management LLC has put forward three nominees for the Pacira Board of Directors at the 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Shareholders are not required to take any immediate action regarding this. Pacira is known for its focus on providing innovative, non-opioid pain treatments to enhance patient wellbeing.

Kestra Medical Technologies, Ltd. closes IPO with over-allotment option exercised in full, sells 1,782,352 shares at $17.00 each, raising $232M.
news.summary: Kestra Medical Technologies, Ltd., a company specializing in wearable medical devices and digital healthcare, revealed that the underwriters of its initial public offering have fully exercised their over-allotment option, purchasing 1,782,352 additional shares of common stock at the set price of $17.00 per share. This brings the total shares sold in the offering to 13,664,704, generating roughly $232 million in gross proceeds for Kestra, before accounting for underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses. The sale of the over-allotment option was finalized on March 14, 2025, in Kirkland, Washington.

INFRA announces plans for first "Giga Hub" in LA, advancing global AV infrastructure, targeting smart city expansion.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, a San Francisco tech firm called INFRA revealed its intention to establish its inaugural "Giga Hub" in Los Angeles. This move marks a significant step in the company's initiative to expand and develop a worldwide infrastructure for autonomous vehicles (AVs).

news.headline: ExGen completes acquisition of Spark North Lithium Project, expanding its portfolio.
ExoPTEN study shows potential in enhancing motor function, blood flow, and spinal cord injury recovery.
news.summary: A preclinical study conducted on ExoPTEN has shown promising results in enhancing motor function and increasing blood flow following spinal cord injuries. The study revealed a significant improvement in motor function, with a notable increase in blood flow post-injury. Additionally, faster recovery was observed in subjects treated with ExoPTEN. These findings suggest the potential of ExoPTEN in improving outcomes for individuals with spinal cord injuries.

news.headline: Dow Jones Industrial Average posts biggest weekly percent drop since March 2023.

Is Trump crashing markets intentionally? Speculation suggests administration might be forcing Fed rate cuts. Recession odds at 40%. BUIDL reaches $500M. Cboe aims to add staking to Fidelity's ETH ETF. Regulatory pivot sparks ETF filings surge.
news.summary: The article discusses the rising odds of a recession, crashing markets, and President Trump's approach with tariffs, drawing parallels to his previous term. Trump is said to potentially be deliberately causing market crashes to push the Federal Reserve into lowering interest rates. JPMorgan analysts have increased recession odds to 40%, while Goldman Sachs predicts a 20% chance due to US policies. BlackRock's BUIDL tokenization company has partnered with RedStone, expanding its use cases in DeFi and reaching $500 million in assets. Cboe BZX is seeking approval to add staking to Fidelity's Ether ETF, potentially boosting investor appeal. The SEC's regulatory pivot on crypto ETF filings since Trump's inauguration is also noted.

news.headline: Coinbase and Gemini aim to offer tokenized securities. Coinbase seeks approval, a goal predating its 2021 IPO.
news.summary: Is Coinbase on the verge of receiving approval to provide tokenized securities on its platform? The company has been keen on offering this service even before its public debut in 2021.

news.headline: Bocana Resources Corp cancels and reissues 2.4M stock options due to timeline issue with TSXV.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 14, 2025, Bocana Resources Corp. (TSXV: BOCA) (Frankfurt: VC1) received notification from the TSX Venture Exchange regarding the 2,400,000 stock options granted to directors and officers on May 24, 2024. These options were issued outside of the required timeline for the Company’s Stock-Based Compensation Plan to take effect. Consequently, the Company has decided to rescind the initial stock options granted on May 24, 2024, and will reissue them with the same terms as previously assigned.

news.summary: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate has risen to 7.5%, with approximately 10.9 million people currently without jobs. This is a significant increase compared to the previous quarter. The data also reveals that the economy shrank by 2.3% in the last fiscal year, marking a concerning downturn. The government is now facing pressure to implement measures to stimulate growth and create more employment opportunities.Officials have acknowledged the severity of the situation and are working on strategies to address the economic challenges ahead. The report underscores the urgent need for intervention to boost the economy and alleviate the growing unemployment crisis.
